assignments.twist: distribution-dependent (McKean-Vlasov) mean-field Ito SDE with Poisson-jump noise on two separated time scales, studied via a large-deviation / averaging principle

core_model_summary: Establishes a large deviation principle for a two-time-scale McKean-Vlasov (mean-field, distribution-dependent) system of Ito SDEs with jumps, using a variational/weak-convergence framework and a Khasminskii-type averaging principle.
